description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a blocky, pixelated design reminiscent of retro video game aesthetics, with a green and brown camouflage-like pattern covering most of its exterior. The front face includes a large, square display screen set within a deep bezel, and a single joystick is mounted on the control panel below the screen. The control panel is simple, with no visible buttons aside from the joystick, and the lower front panel displays a pixelated gray and green motif. The side panels are fully wrapped in the same pixelated green pattern, giving the cabinet a cohesive, stylized look. The top of the cabinet is angled and also covered in the pixelated design, with no visible marquee artwork or text. The overall shape is classic for arcade cabinets, with a slanted screen and a protruding control area.
description: A pixelated, green-and-brown arcade game cabinet with a single joystick, a large square screen, and a retro, blocky design. The cabinet is fully wrapped in a camouflage-like pixel pattern and lacks visible marquee artwork.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the full pixelated green side panel and the protruding control area with a single joystick.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a mostly gray pixelated back panel with some green and brown at the edges, and no visible controls or screen.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same green pixelated pattern and the angled top profile.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the large square screen, single joystick on the control panel, and the pixelated lower front panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single joystick centered on the control panel, no visible buttons, single-player layout.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Pixelated green and brown camouflage-like pattern covering the entire side panels.
